languages.text: "Иногда для спасения требуется отчаянный шаг. Это единственный выход, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Двигаться во тьму меж холодных звезд, удаляясь от Астрономикона — по меркам многих, безумие еще большее".

traits.locale_text: "Иногда для спасения требуется отчаянный шаг. Это единственный выход, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Двигаться во тьму меж холодных звезд, удаляясь от Астрономикона — по меркам многих, безумие еще большее".
traits.speaker: DLC3_DL_SeberianVonValancius

languages.text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."
languages.original_text: "Иногда для спасения требуется отчаянный шаг. Это единственный выход, наследни{mf|к|ца}. Двигаться во тьму меж холодных звезд, удаляясь от Астрономикона — по меркам многих, безумие еще большее".

traits.locale_text: "Sometimes salvation requires a desperate step. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between cold stars, moving away from the Astronomican. By the measure of many, this is an even greater madness."

"Sometimes salvation requires a desperate step. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between cold stars, moving away from the Astronomican. By the measure of many, this is an even greater madness."

"Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

"Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

"Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

languages.text: “有时候，想获得救赎就必须孤注一掷。这是唯一的办法，继承人。涉足冰冷群星之间的黑暗，远离星炬之光——在许多人看来，这甚至更为疯狂。”
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: “有时候，想获得救赎就必须孤注一掷。这是唯一的办法，继承人。涉足冰冷群星之间的黑暗，远离星炬之光——在许多人看来，这甚至更为疯狂。”

languages.text: «En ocasiones, la salvación exige medidas desesperadas. Es la única opción, hereder{mf|o|a}. Adentrarnos en las tinieblas que separan las estrellas, alejándonos del Astronomicón es, según muchos, una locura aún mayor».
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: «En ocasiones, la salvación exige medidas desesperadas. Es la única opción, hereder{mf|o|a}. Adentrarnos en las tinieblas que separan las estrellas, alejándonos del Astronomicón es, según muchos, una locura aún mayor».

languages.text: « Parfois, pour notre propre salut, nous devons prendre des mesures désespérées. C'est le seul moyen, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Pour le plus grand nombre, s'aventurer dans l'obscurité qui sépare les étoiles glacées, loin de l'Astronomican, est une plus grande folie encore. »
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: « Parfois, pour notre propre salut, nous devons prendre des mesures désespérées. C'est le seul moyen, mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Pour le plus grand nombre, s'aventurer dans l'obscurité qui sépare les étoiles glacées, loin de l'Astronomican, est une plus grande folie encore. »

languages.text: "Bazen kurtuluş, çaresiz adımlar atmamızı gerektirir. Tek yol bu vârisim. Soğuk yıldızlar arasındaki karanlığa açılmak, Astronomikan'dan uzaklaşmak; birçoğunun ölçüsüne göre daha da büyük bir deliliktir."
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: "Bazen kurtuluş, çaresiz adımlar atmamızı gerektirir. Tek yol bu vârisim. Soğuk yıldızlar arasındaki karanlığa açılmak, Astronomikan'dan uzaklaşmak; birçoğunun ölçüsüne göre daha da büyük bir deliliktir."

languages.text: "Ab und an erfordert die Erlösung verzweifelte Maßnahmen. Das ist der einzige Weg, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. In die Dunkelheit zwischen den kalten Sternen zu reisen, weg vom Astronomican, ist in den Augen vieler ein noch größerer Irrsinn."
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: "Ab und an erfordert die Erlösung verzweifelte Maßnahmen. Das ist der einzige Weg, {mf|Erbe|Erbin}. In die Dunkelheit zwischen den kalten Sternen zu reisen, weg vom Astronomican, ist in den Augen vieler ein noch größerer Irrsinn."

languages.text: 「救済には、時には狂気じみた行動が必要となる。この星間空間の暗闇に足を踏み入れ、天文台から離れることは、多くの者の尺度では、さらに狂気じみた行為である。」
languages.original_text: "Sometimes salvation requires we take desperate steps. This is the only way, heir. To venture into the darkness between the cold stars, to move away from the Astronomican, is, by the measure of many, an even greater madness."

traits.locale_text: 「救済には、時には狂気じみた行動が必要となる。この星間空間の暗闇に足を踏み入れ、天文台から離れることは、多くの者の尺度では、さらに狂気じみた行為である。」
